episodes.title: NXIVM & Stan Culture with Amanda Montell from Sounds Like a Cult
episodes.description:
Troy and Dara are talkin' cults with two-time NYT best-selling author and podcaster, Amanda Montell!

We compare NXIVM vs the Manson Family, Jared Leto's budding cult, and the stan CULTure of Taylor Swift, Heated Rivalry, and Britney Spears. 

Follow ⁠Amanda on Instagram⁠ » https://www.instagram.com/amanda_montell/
Check out her podcasts:
⁠Sounds Like a Cult⁠ » https://www.soundslikeacult.com/
⁠Magical Overthinkers⁠ » https://bio.site/magicaloverthinkers
Buy her books! ⁠
Cultish⁠ » https://www.harpercollins.com/products/cultish-amanda-montell?variant=40823624892450
The Age of Magical Overthinking » https://www.simonandschuster.com/books/The-Age-of-Magical-Overthinking/Amanda-Montell/9781668007983
⁠Wordslut⁠ » https://www.harpercollins.com/products/wordslut-amanda-montell?variant=32205545340962

The article we discussed in this episode: 
⁠The Horny Holy Man by Vanessa Grigoriadis » https://www.vanityfair.com/news/2019/06/inside-the-end-nxivm-empowerment-sex-cult?srsltid=AfmBOooC0XDZoBqelHmFpOhbxEz2fUbSW5P_uT7mQETSxROgacRI-88d
